search_scope: Neural processing unit NPU on-device AI

verification_status.sanmartin_2023_tpu: NOT_FOUND - arXiv ID 2309.08918 not accessible due to rate limiting

all_papers.title: In-datacenter performance analysis of a tensor processing unit
all_papers.abstract: This paper evaluates a custom ASIC-called a Tensor Processing Unit (TPU)-deployed in datacenters since 2015 that accelerates the inference phase of neural networks (NN) and compares it to a server-class Intel Haswell CPU and an Nvidia K80 GPU, which are contemporaries deployed in the samedatacenters.
all_papers.tldr: Custom ASIC TPU for neural network inference deployed in datacenters outperforms Intel Haswell CPU and Nvidia K80 GPU

all_papers.title: Smith-Waterman Algorithm for Music Plagiarism Detection Using CUDA GPU Acceleration
all_papers.abstract: Demonstrates CUDA GPU acceleration achieving 5.7x speedup for melody comparison and plagiarism detection using Smith-Waterman algorithm on music MIDI files

all_papers.title: Infrared Target Imaging: Ray Tracing Acceleration with CUDA
all_papers.abstract: Ray tracing algorithms accelerated via CUDA for thermal infrared imaging with over 100x speedup in skin projection calculations

all_papers.title: K-means Clustering with CUDA for Real-time Stock Market Prediction
all_papers.abstract: Real-time financial data analysis using K-means clustering accelerated by CUDA, significantly reducing computation time versus CPU

all_papers.title: Parallel Computing for Breast Cancer Image Segmentation
all_papers.abstract: Medical imaging application achieving 2x speedup in mammography image segmentation using GPU parallel computing

all_papers.title: Real-time EEG Signal Processing Using GPU-Accelerated Wavelet Algorithms
all_papers.abstract: GPU acceleration enables real-time evaluation of changes in EEG signals using wavelet analysis algorithms

all_papers.title: Radar Signal-Level Model Parallel Acceleration Method Based on Multi-GPU Architecture
all_papers.abstract: Multi-GPU parallel framework for radar signal processing with odd-even frame allocation, achieving 102.8x-164x speedups in different processing modules

all_papers.title: MIMO Radar Parallel Simulation System Based on CPU/GPU Architecture
all_papers.abstract: Heterogeneous CPU/GPU architecture with OpenMP for coarse-grained CPU acceleration and fine-grained GPU processing for MIMO radar simulation with 13% improvement over GPU-only methods
all_papers.tldr: CPU/GPU heterogeneous architecture for radar simulation improves performance 13% vs GPU-only
